description: MCP server for DefectDojo: 24 tools with RBAC, HMAC audit chain, and SIEM forwarding
name: io.github.inspicere/mcp-defectdojo

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the DefectDojo instance (must use https:// unless ALLOW_INSECURE_HTTP=true)
environmentVariables.name: DEFECTDOJO_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for DefectDojo (generate at DefectDojo > API v2 > Your API Key). Use DEFECTDOJO_READ_API_KEY + DEFECTDOJO_WRITE_API_KEY for least-privilege dual-key mode.
environmentVariables.name: DEFECTDOJO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional read-only API key (used for GET requests in dual-key mode)
environmentVariables.name: DEFECTDOJO_READ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional write API key (used for POST/PATCH in dual-key mode)
environmentVariables.name: DEFECTDOJO_WRITE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token granting admin-role access (legacy single-token mode — prefer MCP_ROLE_<NAME>=<token>:<role> for RBAC)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: HMAC key for audit log integrity chain. Required for cross-restart log verification on network transports. Generate with: python3 -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))'
environmentVariables.name: AUDIT_HMAC_KEY

title: DefectDojo
